name: Homemade Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the oatmeal on a cookie sheet and heat in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
2. Combine all ingredients except wheat germ and raisins in a bowl.
3. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet or pan at 350°F for 20 minutes, stirring once to brown evenly.
4. Allow mixture to cool completely before adding wheat germ and raisins.
5. Store the granola in glass jars or plastic containers.
Note: 1/4 cup serving = 140 calories, 1 starch/bread, 1 fat exchange; 15 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, 7 grams fat, 57 mg sodium. Adapted from Exchanges for all Occasions by Marion Franz, M.S., R.D., C.D.E. Third Edition 1993 ISBN 1-56561-005-9. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier Jan 94.
